approved_control.work_coverage: Implement the lean pre-goal and reviewed replanning control capability across JSON schemas, skill protocols, compiler/guard/verifier scripts, fixtures, and historical regressions.
approved_control.action_that_can_make_it_done: Change repository behavior so lean startup, generation-aware amendments, current-generation validation, explicit evidence import/invalidation, and semantic-regression rejection are executable and tested, not just described.

required_steps.transition: Lean pre-goal default is represented in schemas, routing, and fixtures as requirements plus run.control plus gen-000/runtime without mandatory full design/goal/plan/review.
evidence: routing or orchestrating policy selects lean by default for exploratory work
tests showing lean startup validates without full-chain artifacts

required_steps.transition: Full pre-goal remains available but is selected only by explicit exception criteria.
evidence: routing/orchestrator policy lists full-mode exception triggers
tests showing high-risk or explicitly full workflows still require full artifacts

required_steps.transition: The official run model tracks current_generation and validates complete reviewed gen-N control facts.
evidence: guard rejection for stale or unreviewed current_generation

required_steps.transition: Runtime can emit structured amendment proposals when current strategy cannot produce approved outcomes, while approved anchors stay read-only.
evidence: progress event schema supports amendment events
using-control-json runtime protocol documents amendment triggers and anchor immutability

required_steps.transition: Orchestrator can review an anchor-preserving amendment into the next generation and stops for human approval when anchors would change.
Compiler, guard, and verifier operate on the current approved generation and reject stale, unresolved, or inconsistent generations.
evidence: verifier rejects unresolved amendment and non-current generation final claims

required_steps.transition: Evidence reuse across generations is explicit: imported evidence is declared and invalidated evidence cannot satisfy current generation completion.
evidence: verifier tests showing gen-000 evidence does not automatically satisfy gen-001

required_steps.transition: Historical semantic failures are encoded as regressions that fail or require amendment instead of allowing false completion.

step_action_alignment.what_would_make_it_true: Lean mode validates as a first-class control mode without root-level design/goal/plan/review artifacts and is selected by default for exploratory work.
step_action_alignment.current_state: The current compiler and guard assume a full root-level control chain, and orchestration skill still treats full pre-goal as the heavy default.
step_action_alignment.planned_producing_action: Add run.control schema and lean fixtures, update routing/orchestration text and validation tests so lean mode is the default startup path.
step_action_alignment.why_this_can_make_it_true: The action changes the accepted control shape and workflow rules, so lean mode becomes executable rather than documentation-only.
evidence_after_action: lean pre-goal schema and fixture tests pass
orchestration/routing skill text records lean default and full exception
step_action_alignment.if_not_producible: propose an amendment to refine lean startup constraints without changing approved outcomes

step_action_alignment.what_would_make_it_true: Full mode still exists and is required for explicit high-risk, irreversible, externally impactful, complex coordination, non-replannable, or user-requested full workflows.
step_action_alignment.current_state: Full mode exists as the only compile target; exception criteria are not enforced as a non-default route.
step_action_alignment.planned_producing_action: Update routing/orchestration rules and tests so full mode is preserved but only selected by exception triggers.
step_action_alignment.why_this_can_make_it_true: The route selection logic and tests prevent accidental removal of full mode while preventing it from remaining the default.
evidence_after_action: high-risk or explicitly full workflow fixture still requires full pre-goal
step_action_alignment.if_not_producible: return to design with a concrete conflict between lean default and required full-mode safety

step_action_alignment.what_would_make_it_true: run.control.json identifies the current generation and guard validates that the referenced gen-N has the required reviewed runtime state.
step_action_alignment.current_state: Runtime control is a single root file and has no current_generation index.
step_action_alignment.planned_producing_action: Add run.control schema, generation metadata, fixture layout, and guard validation for current_generation, parent, and generation status.
step_action_alignment.why_this_can_make_it_true: The state transition introduces the missing index object and validates generation completeness.
evidence_after_action: stale or missing current_generation fixture is rejected
step_action_alignment.if_not_producible: propose amendment for a narrower generation metadata model while preserving required outcomes

step_action_alignment.what_would_make_it_true: Runtime protocol supports structured amendment proposals and forbids runtime from editing anchors directly.
step_action_alignment.current_state: Runtime can write progress/status/final report but has no explicit amendment event model.
step_action_alignment.planned_producing_action: Add amendment proposal schema and progress event types, then update using-control-json protocol to require amendment proposal on strategy mismatch.
step_action_alignment.why_this_can_make_it_true: The action gives runtime a controlled third path between false completion and hard block.
evidence_after_action: using-control-json documents amendment triggers and anchor immutability
step_action_alignment.if_not_producible: block only if runtime cannot safely report strategy mismatch without changing approved anchors

step_action_alignment.what_would_make_it_true: An anchor-preserving amendment can be reviewed into a next generation, while any anchor or authority change stops for human approval.
step_action_alignment.current_state: Review has return_to_stage fields, but orchestration does not yet define amendment proposal intake and generation switch behavior.
step_action_alignment.planned_producing_action: Update orchestration/reviewing skills and tests for amendment intake, anchor-change detection, review approval, generation creation, and current_generation update.
step_action_alignment.why_this_can_make_it_true: The orchestration policy becomes a controlled mutation gate for derived strategy.
evidence_after_action: anchor-preserving amendment fixture creates reviewed next generation
anchor-changing amendment fixture requires human approval
step_action_alignment.if_not_producible: return to design for a safer reviewed amendment protocol

step_action_alignment.what_would_make_it_true: Compiler, guard, verifier, and runtime validator use run.control current_generation and reject unresolved amendments or stale generation claims.
step_action_alignment.current_state: Tools assume one root-level full control chain and do not reason about current_generation or unresolved amendments.
step_action_alignment.planned_producing_action: Update compile_runtime_goal.py, control_chain_guard.py, validate_control_chain.py, verify_runtime_progress.py, and related tests to handle generation-aware run roots.
step_action_alignment.why_this_can_make_it_true: The core enforcement tools become aligned with generation-aware runtime semantics.
evidence_after_action: verifier rejects unresolved amendment and stale generation final claims
step_action_alignment.if_not_producible: propose amendment separating lean compile support from verifier support while preserving final safety

step_action_alignment.what_would_make_it_true: New generations explicitly declare imported and invalidated evidence; verifier refuses implicit carry-over.
step_action_alignment.current_state: Progress evidence is not tied to generation import and invalidation semantics.
step_action_alignment.planned_producing_action: Add schema/runtime fields and verifier logic for imported_evidence and invalidated_evidence, plus tests for non-automatic reuse.
step_action_alignment.why_this_can_make_it_true: The verifier will stop treating previous-generation completion as current-generation completion unless explicitly imported.
evidence_after_action: old evidence not auto reused test passes
imported and invalidated evidence fixture validates
step_action_alignment.if_not_producible: return to design with the exact evidence lifecycle ambiguity

step_action_alignment.what_would_make_it_true: Regression tests encode the historical api/v2 readiness and checkpoint-only full-ceiling failures, plus unresolved amendment and stale generation failures.
step_action_alignment.current_state: Existing checks cover schema and some required outcome coverage, but historical execution-layer semantic substitutions can still evade final completion.
step_action_alignment.planned_producing_action: Add fixtures and tests that reject readiness-as-implementation, checkpoint-only-as-full-ceiling, unresolved amendment success, stale current_generation, and automatic old-evidence satisfaction.
step_action_alignment.why_this_can_make_it_true: The historical failure modes become executable acceptance checks.
evidence_after_action: api/v2 readiness regression fails without amendment
checkpoint-only full-ceiling regression fails without amendment
unresolved amendment and stale current_generation regressions fail final completion
step_action_alignment.if_not_producible: do not claim goal completion; report the exact historical regression that lacks an executable check

work_packages.state_change_it_produces: Lean default, full exception, and generation-aware run control become represented by executable schemas, routing/orchestration policy, and fixtures.
Runtime has a structured amendment proposal path and orchestration/review can convert approved anchor-preserving amendments into next-generation control.
Compiler, guard, validator, verifier, and evidence lifecycle become current-generation aware.
Historical semantic failure modes are encoded as executable regressions that block false completion or require reviewed amendment.
